Actions.Text: REFERRED TO INVESTIGATIONS AND GOVERNMENT OPERATIONS

Title: Authorizes the city of Glen Cove to impose a hotel and motel tax
Summary: Authorizes a hotel and motel tax in the city of Glen Cove, in the county of Nassau, at a rate of four percent.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the tax law, in relation to authorizing the city of Glen Cove to impose a hotel and motel tax
